## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/CD or workflow update
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related issue

Closes #

## Implementation notes

Call out important design choices, tradeoffs, or migration details.

## Validation

List the commands you ran and their results.

```bash
npm run -s lint
npm run -s typecheck
npm run -s test:unit
```

## Release impact

- [ ] No user-facing changes
- [ ] Patch release
- [ ] Minor release
- [ ] Major release

## API and compatibility

- [ ] Public API unchanged
- [ ] Public API changed and documented
- [ ] Backward compatibility impact reviewed

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the repository contribution guidelines.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I updated docs or comments where needed.
- [ ] I verified CI-related changes use pinned action SHAs.
- [ ] I verified no secrets were introduced.
